vehicles.slot: Cap near selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate the plastic cap near the gear selector base on the center console. Pry off with a key.
Insert key into the exposed slot and press firmly downward.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Move the selector from Park to Neutral. Replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
12V battery under the hood — connect jump pack.
Once powered, press brake and shift to N normally.
FWD: lift from rear — front (drive) wheels roll on ground.
vehicles.notes: FWD — rear lift. Common on roads despite discontinuation in 2010.
vehicles.towMethod: Lift from rear (front FWD drive wheels roll).

vehicles.slot: Cap near selector base on console
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate the shift lock cap near the selector base on the center console. Pry off.
Insert key into the slot and press firmly downward.
Press the brake pedal while holding.
Move the selector to Neutral. Replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
12V battery under the hood — connect jump pack.
Once powered, press brake and shift to N normally.
FWD: lift from rear — front (drive) wheels roll on ground.
vehicles.towMethod: Lift from rear (front FWD wheels roll).

vehicles.slot: Cap near selector base on console
shift: Find cap near selector base. Pry off.
Insert key, press.
Press brake. Move to N.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Battery under hood.
Connect jump pack.
Shift normally.

vehicles.slot: Cap near selector base on console
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
The Vibe is built on the Toyota Matrix/Corolla platform — locate the shift lock slot near the gear selector base.
Pry off the cap with a key or thin flathead.
Insert key into the slot and press firmly.
Press the brake pedal while holding.
Move the selector to Neutral. Replace cap.
MANUAL TRANSMISSION: depress clutch and move gear lever to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
12V battery under the hood — connect jump pack.
Once powered, press brake and shift to N normally.
FWD: lift from rear — front (drive) wheels roll on ground.
vehicles.notes: Toyota Matrix twin. AWD: flatbed preferred. Manual option available.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: rear lift. AWD GT: flatbed preferred.
towNotes: Toyota Matrix twin — shares all service data.

vehicles.slot: Cap near selector base on console
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate the shift lock cap near the selector base on the center console.
Pry off cap and insert key into the slot. Press firmly.
Press the brake pedal while holding.
Move selector to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
12V battery under the hood — connect jump pack.
Once powered, shift normally.
FWD: lift from rear. AWD: flatbed preferred — no transfer case neutral on Torrent AWD.
vehicles.notes: Chevrolet Equinox twin. AWD: flatbed preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: rear lift. AWD: flatbed preferred.

vehicles.slot: Cap or slot near selector base on console
shift: Find cap near selector base. Pry off.
Insert key, press.
Press brake. Move to N.
Manual: clutch, N.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Battery under hood.
Connect jump pack.
Shift normally.
RWD: lift from front.
vehicles.notes: Roadster/convertible. RWD — lift from front. Very low clearance.
vehicles.warn: Very low ground clearance. Use flatbed or minimal ramp angle.
vehicles.towMethod: Lift from front (rear RWD wheels roll). Flatbed preferred due to low clearance.
towNotes: Convertible soft top — do not strap over roof.

knownIssues.title: Very Low Ground Clearance
knownIssues.detail: The Solstice roadster has very low ground clearance, especially when found lowered or with aftermarket suspension. Use a flatbed when possible. If using wheel-lift, check clearance carefully.

vehicles.slot: Small cap near selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON (key to Run position — do not start).
Locate the shift lock override: small cap near selector base on center console.
Pry off the plastic cap with your ignition key or a small flathead screwdriver.
Insert the key (or a thin flathead) into the slot and press firmly downward.
While holding the slot, press the brake pedal.
Move the selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove key from slot and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake and chock wheels.
Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to Neutral normally.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air.

vehicles.slot: Small cap near selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON (key to Run position — do not start).
Locate the shift lock override: small cap near selector base on center console.
Pry off the plastic cap with your ignition key or a small flathead screwdriver.
Insert the key (or a thin flathead) into the slot and press firmly downward.
While holding the slot, press the brake pedal.
Move the selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove key from slot and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake and chock wheels.
Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to Neutral normally.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air.

vehicles.slot: Small cap near selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate the cap near the selector base on the center console. Pry off.
Insert key into slot and press firmly.
While holding, press brake. Move selector to Neutral.
MANUAL: depress clutch and move gear lever to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake and chock wheels.
Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood, driver side.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to Neutral normally.
vehicles.notes: RWD F-body platform. Same as Camaro. Manual trans: depress clutch.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from rear — rear (drive) wheels in the air. Flatbed preferred.
towNotes: Same platform as Camaro — identical procedure.

vehicles.slot: Small cap near selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate the small cap near the selector base on the center console. Pry off.
Insert key into slot and press firmly.
While holding, press brake. Move to Neutral.
MANUAL: depress clutch and move to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake and chock wheels.
Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to Neutral normally.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air.

vehicles.slot: Small cap near gear selector base on console
shift: Turn ignition to ON (do not start engine).
Locate the shift lock release: small cap near gear selector base on console.
Pry off cap with small flathead.
Insert key or thin flathead and press firmly downward.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Move selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove tool and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake and chock wheels.
Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to Neutral normally.
vehicles.notes: Trans Sport (1990-1999), Montana (1999-2009). AWD: flatbed preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front. AWD: flatbed preferred.
towNotes: FWD: lift from front. AWD: flatbed preferred.
